name: cosmosmith
description: A multi-agent skill system for turning rough ideas into researched specs, task flows, implementation, verification, and release.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into specs, tasks, implementation, verification, and release.
interface.longDescription: Cosmosmith packages short connected skills, templates, and validation loops for multi-agent product and software creation.
defaultPrompt: Turn this rough idea into a Cosmosmith proposal.
Create a task ledger from this product direction.
Review this project for Cosmosmith rule drift.
